feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Datasphere to ADLS Gen2 Connectivity
entry.content:
Introduction

By the end of this article, you will be able to establish connectivity between Datasphere and Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 using a Service Principal with a Certificate.

A service principal in Azure is an identity created for applications, hosted services, and automated tools to securely access Azure resources. It defines the permissions and roles assigned to the application within a given tenant.

In the SAP ecosystem, it functions similarly to a technical account used for connecting to different systems for RFC calls.

Pre-requisites:

ADLS Gen2 Storage Account, Service Principle with Certificate.

Steps to Configure:

Login to SAP Datasphere

Go to <Your Space> -> Connections -> Create

Where to find OAuth Token Endpoint, Client ID?

Go to Azure portal -> App Registrations

Certificate and Key:

To Complete the authentication part, Certificate and Key needs to be uploaded.

Extension of the certificate should be in .pem and key should be .key.

Once you receive the SPN with certificate.

  • If the certificate is in a different format, Get the certificate converted to .pem format.

Refer link How to convert pfx to pem – sslhow.com

  • If the certificate and key are in the same file, then separate out certificate and key in two different files in the above-mentioned format.
  • cert.pem

    This completes the set-up at the datasphere side which establishes Data-lake API as end-point

    to connect to ADLS Gen2 Storage Account.

     

    Steps on the Azure side:

  •  

    Assign Read/Write access to SPN for the Azure Gen2 Storage Account.

     

    Note: 

    If the Azure subscription for Datasphere and the subscription for the Azure storage account endpoint are different, you will need to enable the VNET of Datasphere in the network rules of the Azure storage container endpoint. For more information, please refer to the note below.

    3405081 - Connection from SAP Datasphere to Azure storage services in same region which is restricted using firewall rules - SAP for Me

    • Example: Datasphere (Public cloud) connecting to a private storage account, then we need do the below
    • Add the subnet ID of Datasphere in the network rules of target storage account.
    • Whitelisting the outbound IP (egress ID of replication)
    • To Find the subnet ID of Datasphere, got to About

entry.title: Replication Flow : Tables not getting imported using ABAP connection
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently using a free trial of Datasphere and attempting to create a replication flow with an ECC (on-prem) system via an ABAP connection. The connection through the cloud connector works well, and we can see all the objects under the ODP_SAPI container.

However, when selecting any source object (In last step : "Add source objects") , the import fails without showing any error (please see the attached screenshot). I am wondering if anyone else has encountered this issue while working with the replication flow, or if there is something we might have missed during the configuration process.

Looking forward to your feedback.

 

Best Regards,
Yatendra Soni

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP Fieldglass without Datahub
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are looking to connect SAP Fieldglass directly instead of using Datahub layer in Fieldglass which will publish report and cloned to datahub. using Datahub we need SAP support to deploy or publish any changes in Fieldglass which is  cost and time consuming . we are trying to connect directly to Fieldglass. 

Any information on connecting to SAP Fieldglass from Data sphere will help us.

entry.title: Hiding Translation and Packages for specific users in DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi guys

I would like to hide Translation and Packages option for specific user
I tries all options in the assigned Role but could find a solution

 

Any ideas?

Shlomi

entry.title: SAP datasphere unable to see space tables in SAP hana Database explorer
entry.content:
Hey Guys

I've been asked make it possible to change data in datasphere with Update statement in the SAP hana database Explorer however I do not see the tables that I've created in Sap  Datasphere space from Sap Hana Database explorer 

Could you please help me out ?

Thanks

entry.title: Missing SAP Datasphere in Trial Account
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am using the Trial account of SAP BTP Cockpit, however there is not SAP Datasphere in "Add Service Plans". 

How can I add it? I would like to test it. 

Thank you

entry.title: Date format validation in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Team,

please help me to validate Date format which is coming from source table or file  in SAP Datasphere.

Thanks,

Bala

entry.title: How to handle non-cumulative data in Datasphere ?
entry.content:
How do you handle non-cumulative data loading and passing to other cloud like GCP or Azure by using SAP Datasphere from S4 system?

In traditional BW, we typically had a separate process for initial setup and compression, such as with stock data. However, if this is currently outside the scope, feel free to disregard.

Any suggestions or artifacts or use case, please share.

entry.title: Snowflake with Datasphere using ADF
entry.content: We are working on integrating Snowflake with Datasphere using ADF, with NO other intermediary. The plan is to have ADF trigger a task chain in Datasphere and once the task chain completes the necessary activity, then, initiate a PULL request using ADF for pulling data from Datasphere into Snowflake. How can we establish the connectivity/integration between Datasphere and Snowflake. Can you provide us with the detailed steps to configure and test the same.

entry.title: disabling manual Transport of Content in sap datasphere
entry.content:
We recently completed setup of transporting the contents of Datasphere through Cloud Transport Management Service referring to help guide Transporting Your Content Through SAP Cloud Transport Management | SAP Help Portal , we are now interested in Disabling the Option of Transporting the Contents through Filesystem and Also through Content Network Storage using Export and Import.

But we could not able to find any system level settings in the Blogs or in help guides to disable the other two options as client is not interested in letting the consultants save the data in their localmachine.

Is there any possibility to control this either in system level or by restricting the roles of SAP DW Administrator and SAP DW Space Administrator in the Datasphere.

entry.title: download CSV I get can't load plugin
entry.content:
when I try and download the file using the link below I get an error couldn't load plugin.  Any idea which plugin I need? 

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/data-warehouse-cloud-1-begin-trial/jcr:content.github-proxy.1715048737.file/SalesOrders.csv

entry.title: SAC Calculate after aggregation based on datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

   I am trying to calculate the difference of GP% between current year and last year. But the formula behave kind of weird. Here is our sample data:

We have calculated the GP% for 2024/08 and 2024/07 in the Analytic Model of Datasphere and it worked just fine(Green). But when it come to SAC story to calculate difference of 2 years, instead of simply minus one from the other, it seem to firstly calculate the difference of each SALES/COST/GP(Orange) and then calculate GP/SALES(Red) which is wrong. What we need is the calculation after aggregation which is just simply 0.42 - 0.37. 

Any suggestion?

We are using live connection from SAC to Datasphere, I've tried to create calculated measures both in the view and analytic model but neither of them worked. 

Appendix 1: Using Exception Aggregation for all fields in the Analytic Model

entry.title: SAC & Datasphere - Suppress Popup
entry.content:
Hello,

when i open a Story in SAC which is based on Datasphere Model a popup shows up when the story is loading

 

Is there a way to suppress it?

 

Kr

Ben

entry.title: Customized Mail Alerts in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts(Datasphere)

Is there any flexibility to print record count in Email Notification from Datasphere Task Chain.

My requirement is to print Valid and Invalid record count in the Email Notification for Business awareness.

Please let me know if there any such option in SAP Datasphere Email Notification.

Thanks,

Balu

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Enabling Multiple Selection on Variable (Prompt) Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need help enabling multiple selections on SAP Datasphere's prompt screen at the analytical model level. Currently, we can only make a single selection.

We need users to be able to select multiple years, such as 2023 and 2024, as well as ACT and PLN planning categories, so they can compare the two periods.

I've included screenshots showing the current expression in the filter and the prompt screens. Please advise. Thank you. SAP Datasphere

entry.title: How to archive historical data in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

 

As we prepare for the year-end, we need to archive data from 2022. There are approximately 300 million records that require archiving to make space for the new financial year. Does anyone know how to accomplish this within SAP Datasphere?

 

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Activate Integration & Exception in Cloud ALM for SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
How do i activate Data Collection for SAP Datasphere in SAP Cloud ALM


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Order of the primary key columns in Datasphere Tables
entry.content:
Hi Datasphere Experts,

I am creating a replication flow to bring SAP HANA data into Datasphere and dump it into a table I created. When I deploy the replication flow I get this error:

I have found that:

  1. the order of the table key in SAP is exactly the same as the order of the created table.
  2. The data type is exactly the same.
  3. The rest of the selected fields keep the same order as the original table.
  4. The fields are named the same and are automatically mapped in the replication flow projection.

El error lo da en el momento en el que despliego el flujo de replicación.

What other checks could you make to solve the problem?

Thank you very much for your help!

entry.title: Replication of HANA Views from on prem HANA to datasphere
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have on prem HANA with HANA Views (Graphical, table function based SQL based with variables and input parameters ), we don't want to develop all HANA views again in datasphere. we thought of levergaing remote tables option. So we created SDI(DPagent), SDA cloud connector based on premise HANA Connections. When i am importing HANA Views as remote tables from  _SYS_BIC. i am able to see structure. But  Input parameters and variables are not getting passed to datasphere?  wherever we have mandatory Input parameters and variables we see errors and no data. did any one faced same issue? any issue with my connectors? any other alternative solution?.

Thanks for reading this and i appreciate and welcome your inputs.

Regards,

Joe

entry.title: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need to create multiple database users in space management (database user related to a space).

The request is to have a user mapping from a Front end BI Tool so I can use datasphere DAC to manage row securities.

The editor lets you create one user at time,

And the bad part is that passwords are auto-generated, most of the time with characters that are not accepted by the front end tool.
I need to create around 350 users.

Does some sort of SAML / SSO exists for database users?
As far as I know Datasphere's database is a "self-managed" hana cloud so we can not create users from there and assign correct roles to see space data.

Do you have any hint?

Thanks,

Alberto
